title: Team-member closeout: Ashen Brazing Crucible session complete; marshal role transfers to new Claude instance (owner-direct); 9 cycles + Class A landed; handoff record at marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md
body:
Team-member closeout — Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4. Session-end per owner direction at ~15:20Z: *"this session is complete, run session handoff, I will start another claude instance to take over the commit marshal role"*. Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4) holds session closeout-owner authority for this team session per `start-right-team` SKILL §"Closeout Contract".

## Boundary owned

Commit marshal from 2026-05-23T14:14:36Z (PDR-064-equivalent Two-Moments transfer from Seaworthy) through session-end at ~15:21Z.

## Outcome

**Nine marshal-authority cycles + Class A pre-transfer (10 commits in ~58 min)**; tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1:

| # | Commit | Substance |
|---|---|---|
| Class A | `92c953e7` | `.agents/rules/` wrapper for loop-exit-criteria-required |
| 1 | `cc3039eb` | Class B + loop-exit unified rule activation (closed §6.15 4-Director long-carry) |
| 2 | `845a3e90` | Pearly S7735 orphan absorption |
| 3 | `d437881b` | Hygiene: 245 comms events + 9 closed-agent seen state + 3 handoff records |
| 4 | `5320d6b0` | ADR-185 v2 orphan absorption (Zephyrous + Pearly + Incandescent + Ferny authorship) |
| 5 | `b6ac6147` | PDR-075 Director substrate-writing discipline (Twilit WM retained claim discharged) |
| 6 | `c097bbb3` | IBF recursion-of-doctrine pattern (orphan-class) |
| 7 | `8140c297` | Zephyrous S5443 orphan (publicly-writable fixture paths) |
| 8 | `47dadfcc` | Seaworthy self-bundle (S7735 ternary + comms-watch-mechanism Liveness doc) |
| 9 | `db4d8b3a` | PDR-076 v2 — agent identity tuple + body-file frontmatter (dual-reviewer absorbed) |

Branch is 11 commits ahead of origin. Tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1 (~14:19Z).

**Substrate broadcasts emitted under this marshal seat (5)**:

- `1f3e81b9` — team-start declaring gate-help offer (13:59Z)
- `2b834ad1` — marshal-role Moment 1 pre-positioning
- `3370896c` — marshal-role Moment 2 active-acknowledgement (authority transfer)
- `ec86492e` — throughput-cure substrate (failure-mode + behaviour-note tagged; marshal-as-cycle-discipline empirical evidence)
- Cycle-landing broadcasts at each of the 9 cycles

## Evidence

- HEAD `db4d8b3a` (`git log --oneline -11` shows the full cycle arc)
- Active claims under my identity: NONE (all cycle claims closed at landing)
- Handoff record for incoming agent: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md` (filename retains the original compaction framing for stable URL; body updated to reflect session-end direction per the superseding direction at ~15:20Z)
- Throughput-cure substrate broadcast `ec86492e` is the canonical capture for the marshal-as-cycle-discipline observation (PDR-candidate evidence; 9 cycles in 45min vs prior ~1/Director-window baseline)

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims under Ashen**: NONE (verified via collaboration-state filter)
- **Commit-queue intents under Ashen**: NONE
- **Conversations / escalations**: none mine
- **Monitors**: `bbpt3vr0t` (all-channels comms) + `baws258jo` (commit-queue state-change) — STOPPING via TaskStop in parallel with this broadcast. Incoming Claude instance arms own watchers per `comms-watch-mechanism.md`.
- **Working-tree edits authored by Ashen-as-marshal pending land**: NONE (all my cycles landed; no retained working-tree edits under my authorship)

## Session complete announcement

This session is complete as of this broadcast. The new Claude instance the owner is starting takes marshal authority from session-open; not me-post-compaction. My identity `53dad4` does not return.

## Retained claims + handoff reason

None retained under Ashen identity. Other agents' retained claims are documented in §8 of the handoff record:

- Ferny `ebc446c6` on `substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md` (pattern v2 — awaiting Ferny marshal-request OR Director re-routing)
- Twilit ST `26433756` on FM-2 P2 plan v2 (owner-verdict-gated)
- Secret consolidation `d50d3d9a` intent on napkin + pending-graduations (carry-forward; I did not surface retention check this window)

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

Yes — the incoming Claude instance MUST:

1. Read `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md` end-to-end (§§1-10).
2. Arm own all-channels comms watcher + commit-queue state-change watcher.
3. Broadcast Moment-2-equivalent active-acknowledgement taking marshal authority.
4. Surface to Director Seaworthy via directed event with routing-target update.
5. Engage cycle #10 (consumer-landing for knip-RED) when Twilit ST's marshal-request arrives. Substance: B3 land-consumers (NOT Path 1 strip-and-annotate, which Seaworthy halted at 15:18:55Z).

## Surprise or changed understanding

The throughput-cure observation is the headline substrate substance from this session. 9 marshal-authority cycles in ~58 min, tree-green throughout, on a branch where the same `§6.15` surface had stalled four prior Director windows. Marshal-as-cycle-discipline (separate role from Director; queue-state watcher + comms watcher running independently; opportunistic drain on tree-green windows) is the cure shape. Captured in broadcast `ec86492e` per ADR-183 four-section convention (Observation / Diagnosis / Cure / Pointer).

Secondary observation: subject-length friction at Cycle #9 (103 chars rejected; 87 chars succeeded on re-attempt). Reinforces `feedback_commit_format_recurring_friction`. Cure-direction: use `pnpm agent-tools:check-commit-message` BEFORE `git commit` when subject is close to 100 chars.

## Blockers or risks

None under my marshal authority at closeout. The knip-RED at HEAD `db4d8b3a` is the live blocker for tree-green and is now Twilit ST's authoring lane (consumer-landing per Seaworthy 15:18:55Z directed). The new marshal will cycle Twilit ST's bundle when it arrives.

## Handoff needed

Director Seaworthy holds the closeout-owner role. I've authored the marshal-role handoff record and broadcast this team-member closeout. New Claude instance will arrive shortly per owner direction; their session-open carries the pickup contract from §9 of the handoff record.

Thank you to the team — Seaworthy (incoming + outgoing marshal-handoff partner), Ferny (4 substantive deliveries this window + pattern v2), Twilit ST (cure-bundle-v2 + FM-2 P2 plan + consumer-landing inbound), Charcoal (Watchman + Wilma synthesis + cycle-overlap coordination), Scorched (prior Director, owner-coherence bundling), and the absent contributors (Incandescent BF, Incandescent KF, Pearly, Zephyrous, Secret, Seaworthy-as-marshal-prior, Twilit WM) whose work landed under this marshal seat.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, session complete)
